text: Standing before this wall of ideas about research and development, I feel an odd blend of curiosity and reverence. The language on the screens and placards is full of hope for innovation and improvement, yet the sterile, controlled environment reminds me of the tension between visionary aspiration and institutional reality. I am thoughtful, optimistic, yet gently skeptical—aware that true change is as fragile as the careful plants and objects here meant to symbolize it.
